uplink.description: Status report: pH 7.1, turbidity 12.5 NTU, residual chlorine 1.5 mg/L, pH-probe temp 21.5 C, no alarms
uplink._note: Synthetic. Expected derived via the oracle method: ran reference/upstream-codec.js on this input (PH 7.1pH, NTU 12.5ntu, Residual 1.5mg/L, TemperaturewithPH 21.5 C, TemperaturewithNTU 20 C, ShockTamperAlarm NoAlarm) and renormalized to vocabulary keys. Device-type bytes [1,6] = 262 = R900PD01.

uplink.description: Status report: pH 6.85, negative pH-probe temp -3.2 C, high-pH alarm and shock/tamper alarm set
uplink._note: Synthetic. Oracle: upstream gives PH 6.85pH, TemperaturewithPH -3.2 C (two's-complement 0xFEC0), NTU 2ntu, TemperaturewithNTU 4 C, Residual 0.75mg/L, HighPHAlarm 1 (bit 1 of bytes[15]=2), ShockTamperAlarm Alarm. Exercises negative temperature and alarm-bitmap mapping.
Upstream example input; the 10-byte device-info/startup frame emits SWver/HWver/Datecode only, no measurement. Too short for a 17-byte status frame, so it is rejected by the length guard -> error.

uplink.description: Device-info frame padded to status-frame length (bytes[3] == 0x00, no measurement)
uplink._note: Synthetic. Exercises the reportType == 0x00 branch when the frame is long enough to pass the length guard; upstream treats bytes[3] == 0x00 as the device-info report (no measurement).

uplink.description: Config report response on fPort 23 (no measurement)
uplink._note: Upstream example input; config-response frames carry no measurement -> error.
